response.original_title: Almuerzo en honor del Presidente de la República en el BAP "Almirante Grau"
response.overview: A newsreel from the 1940s depicts the reception offered to President Dr. José Luis Bustamante by Captain Manuel R. Nieto on behalf of the Navy. It mentions the pleasant and cordial atmosphere that prevailed during the gathering, which was attended by representatives of the three branches of the armed forces, the Civil Guard, and the police.
response.title: Almuerzo en honor del Presidente de la República en el BAP "Almirante Grau"
